calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-04-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2002 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eric Meckley, Esq. of BROBECK, PHLEGER & HARRISON LLP 442-0900 for defendants UNITED AIR LINES, INC., DAVID KEEFER and BYRON MAY moving for summary judgment/summary adjudication
Aelish M. Joyce, Esq. of LAWLESS & LAWLESS 391-7555 for Plaintiff EDWARD CHERNOV opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion for summary judgment denied -- triable issue of fact exists re age discrimination and retaliation.
Motion for age discrimination denied -- triable issue of fact exists re pretextual reasons for not hiring Plaintiff.
Re retaliation -- denied. Triable issue of fact re hirer's knowledge of EEOC charge.
Re harassment -- granted. Failure to exhaust administrative remedies.
Re hostile environment harassment -- granted -- no triable issue of fact exists re severe and pervasive employment condition.
Re punitive damages -- granted -- no triable issue of fact exists re fraud, oppression and malice.
Re reinstatement of front and back pay -- denied. Triable issue of fact exists re Plaintiff threats to Pallis.
Also, the Court granted summary judgment as to the individual defendants on the claim for age discrimination.
* * * S U B M I T T E D on retaliation as to the individual defendants.
(JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
